    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    I

    ICompiledInstruction - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api.compiling
    Represents a compiled instruction with a fixed opcode and its associated operands.
    ICompiledOperand - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api.compiling
    Represents a compiled operand in an instruction.
    ICompiledProgram - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api.compiling
    Represents a compiled program consisting of a sequence of compiled instructions.
    ICompiler - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api
    Defines the contract for a compiler that transforms a parsed syntax tree into a ICompiledProgram.
    ICondition - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.conditions.api
    Represents a boolean condition that can be evaluated within the context of the Registermaschine execution environment.
    IConfigEventListener - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.api
    Listener interface for receiving notifications when configuration elements are successfully parsed.
    IConfigParser - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.api
    Parser interface for processing XML-based configuration documents.
    IDENTIFIER - Enum constant in enum class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.conditions.nodes.ConditionToken.Type
     
    IExecutionContext - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api
    Represents the runtime state of a Registermaschine during program execution.
    IExecutionContextListener - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api
    Listener interface for observing changes in an IExecutionContext.
    IInstructionSet - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.api
    Represents the instruction registry used by the Registermaschine runtime
    ILexer - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api
    Defines the contract for a lexical analyser (lexer) that transforms source code text into a list of tokens.
    IMMEDIATE - Enum constant in enum class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api.compiling.OperandType
     
    incJumpCounter() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContext
    Increments the internal jump counter.
    incJumpCounter() - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ConcreteExecutionContext
     
    init(boolean, IConfigParser...) - Static method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.CoreConfigParser
    Initialises the core configuration with an option to skip external files
    init(IConfigParser...) - Static method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.CoreConfigParser
    Initialises the core configuration.
    inner() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.conditions.nodes.NotNode
    Returns the value of the inner record component.
    input() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContext
    Retrieves an input value for an executing program.
    input() - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ConcreteExecutionContext
    Requests an input value for the executing program.
    InputInstruction - Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions
    Instruction that reads an input value from the execution context and stores it in a register.
    InputInstruction(byte, int, ICondition) - Constructor for class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.InputInstruction
     
    INSTR_OPTION_ALLOW_LABELS - Static variable in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.XmlConstants
     
    instruction() - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.internal.parsing.ConcreteInstructionNode
     
    INSTRUCTION - Enum constant in enum class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api.lexing.TokenType
     
    InstructionParser - Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.parsers
     
    InstructionParser() - Constructor for class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.parsers.InstructionParser
     
    INSTRUCTIONS - Static variable in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.CoreConfig
    List of all configured instructions in the runtime
    IParser - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api
    Defines the contract for a parser that transforms a sequence of tokens into a syntax tree suitable for compilation.
    isAddress - Variable in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.internal.parsing.ConcreteOperandNode
     
    isHalted() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContext
    Returns whether the machine has halted.
    isHalted() - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ConcreteExecutionContext
    Returns whether the machine is currently halted.
    isImplicit() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.ConfigOperand
    Determines if the operand has an implicit value.
    isRegister - Variable in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.internal.parsing.ConcreteOperandNode
     
    ISyntaxTree - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api.parsing
    Represents a syntax tree produced by the IParser.
    ISyntaxTreeNode - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api.parsing
    Represents a node in a syntax tree.
    IToken - Interface in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api.lexing
    Represents a lexical token produced by a ILexer.
